highlights.text: Marina Bay light show & Gardens by the Bay

itinerary.title: Singapore Highlights Family Tour
itinerary.tagline: Marina Bay Sands • Gardens by the Bay • Sentosa • Night Safari
itinerary.overview: Dive into the vibrant, futuristic city-state of Singapore with TRAGUIN's curated family holiday. A flawless balance of high-energy exploration and iconic sightseeing — Marina Bay, Gardens by the Bay, Night Safari, and Sentosa Island — creating unforgettable memories in Southeast Asia's most spectacular destination.
itinerary.seo_title: SG-001 | Singapore Highlights Family Tour | TRAGUIN
itinerary.seo_description: Premium 03 Nights / 04 Days Singapore family package (SG-001): Marina Bay, Gardens by the Bay, Night Safari, and Sentosa Island.

highlights.text: Gardens by the Bay Cloud Forest

days.title: Arrival in Singapore & Marina Bay
days.description: Arrive in Singapore. Private transfer to handpicked premium hotel. Evening exploring Marina Bay with spectacular light and water show.
activities: Sightseeing Included: VIP airport reception, Marina Bay evening exploration
Meals Included: Welcome arrangements on arrival

days.title: Gardens by the Bay & Night Safari
days.description: Full day at futuristic Gardens by the Bay including Cloud Forest. Evening exclusive Night Safari experience.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Gardens by the Bay, Cloud Forest, Night Safari

days.title: Sentosa Island Fun
days.description: Full day of excitement at Sentosa Island. Universal Studios Singapore or vibrant sandy beaches — perfect for family fun.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Sentosa Island, Universal Studios or beach leisure

days.title: Departure
days.description: Final breakfast before TRAGUIN private transfer to the airport, completing your premium Singapore experience.

inclusions.text: 03 Nights in handpicked premium family hotel in Singapore
Marina Bay, Gardens by the Bay, Night Safari, and Sentosa sightseeing
TRAGUIN 24/7 dedicated on-ground family concierge support
International airfare and Singapore entry visa processing fees
Personal expenses, laundry, room service, and mini-bar charges
Optional sightseeing excursions not specified in the itinerary
Tipping, porterage fees, and travel insurance
